title: The millets: importance, utilization and outlook.
abstract:
The International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid
Tropics (ICRISAT) is pleased to publish this bulletin as a
service to scientists, students and agriculturists concerned
with the improvement of cereals and farming systems throughout
Asia, Africa and Latin America. The genetic improvement of
pearl millet is one of ICRISAT's major projects and — along
several other millets - figures prominently in our research
program on farming systems.
